Product Total Restocked Total Distributed Total Returned Total Delivered Current Balance

                                      ℹ️ No external backup provider is connected (Part 8 explicitly asks not to implement one this phase). What's below are the readiness primitives — a manual settings/data export, and a place for real automated-backup history to land later without any schema change.

                                      📤 Manual Export

                                      Downloads a JSON snapshot of your core configuration — not your full database, just the settings that would be tedious to re-enter.

                                            🔐 Two-Factor Authentication

                                            Loading…

                                            💻 Current Device
                                            Loading…
                                            💻 Active Sessions

                                            Terminating a session revokes its refresh token immediately — it can never be renewed again and disappears from this list right away. Its current access token can technically remain valid for up to your project's JWT expiry window (Auth settings), which is standard JWT behaviour, not a bug here.

                                            Loading…
                                            📱 Trusted Devices
                                            Loading…
                                            🔑 Recovery Codes

                                            One-time codes to get back into your account if you lose access to your authenticator app. Each code works once. Generating a new batch invalidates every old code immediately.

                                            When set, every order to this location is routed to this branch automatically — no need for its name to match a branch's campus text.

                                            ⭐ Favorites
                                            🕘 Recently Changed
                                            Categories
                                            🏪 Business Identity
                                            Business Name Shown on the site and used in message templates
                                            Business Address Used on invoices and business documents
                                            Contact WhatsApp Number Number customers reach when they tap a "Chat on WhatsApp" button (include country code, e.g. +254…)
                                            CurrencyUsed for display formatting across the dashboard
                                            Time Zone
                                            Date Format
                                            Working Days
                                            Business Hours
                                            to
                                            🧾 Tax & Invoice
                                            Tax Rate (%)
                                            Prices Are Tax-Inclusive
                                            Invoice Prefix
                                            Invoice Footer Note
                                            💬 Message Templates
                                            Contact Message TemplatePre-filled message used by the general "Chat on WhatsApp" button on the site
                                            Placeholders: {{business_name}}
                                            Order Message TemplatePre-filled message used for order follow-ups on WhatsApp
                                            Placeholders: {{business_name}}, {{order_id}}, {{product}}, {{customer_name}}
                                            Support Message TemplatePre-filled message used by the "Need help?" / support WhatsApp button
                                            Placeholders: {{business_name}}
                                            Test WhatsApp LinkOpens WhatsApp using the contact number + contact template above
                                            📌 Reusable notification templates with placeholders across categories live in the Communication Center — this section covers only the storefront's direct WhatsApp links.
                                            📱 WhatsApp Configuration
                                            Notification NumberPhone number that receives WhatsApp order alerts
                                            🔔 Notification Toggles
                                            WhatsApp NotificationsMaster switch — send any WhatsApp notifications at all
                                            Customer Order Confirmations
                                            Customer Delivery Notifications
                                            📌 Announcement targeting, retention, and read-receipt rules are configured in the Communication Center. Email/SMS/Push channels are architecture-ready (Part 7) but not wired to a provider yet.
                                            🎨 Brand & Appearance
                                            Business LogoUsed across the dashboard and, where wired up, the storefront
                                            Primary Brand Color
                                            Secondary Brand Color
                                            Dashboard Density
                                            📌 Theme colors and density are recorded here as architecture-only preferences (Part 8) — applying them live across the dashboard's CSS is future work, same posture as Business Rules' "architecture only" fields.
                                            🔒 Security Policy
                                            Minimum Password Length
                                            Max Login AttemptsBefore Supabase Auth should lock the account (enforcement is provider-side)
                                            Session Timeout (minutes)
                                            Audit Log Retention (days)
                                            📌 These are policy values, not yet enforced by Supabase Auth config or a retention job — that wiring is scoped separately. Permission defaults (who can access what) stay in the Permission Engine, unchanged.
                                            💾 Backup & Recovery
                                            Backup Frequency PreferenceRecorded intent only — exports are still manual (Part 10: architecture only, no external provider)
                                            Last Backup Export
                                            –
                                            Run a Backup Export Now
                                            🗂️ Storage Overview
                                            Upload size limits, buckets, and cleanup tools live in the Media Center — shown here for visibility only, not duplicated.
                                            🏬
                                            Branch Settings
                                            Operating hours, delivery radius, order capacity, branch status, manager assignment, and inventory thresholds are configured per-branch in Branch Management — changes there already respect the Approval Center where required.
                                            👤
                                            Employee Settings
                                            Roles, employee permissions, and manager limits are configured in the Permission Engine, inside the Employees tab.
                                            👥
                                            Customer Settings
                                            Customer records, VIP overrides, and loyalty balances are managed in the Customer Hub.
                                            📦
                                            Order Settings
                                            Order status flow, cancellation rules, and delivery time limits live alongside the Orders workspace and the Business Rules Center.
                                            🛵
                                            Delivery Settings
                                            Delivery radius and per-branch delivery availability are set in Branch Management. Delivery workflow status steps live in the Employee Portal / Business Rules Center.
                                            📦
                                            Inventory Settings
                                            Low-stock thresholds, transfers, and reporting are configured in the Inventory and Inventory Reports tabs.
                                            🛍️
                                            Product Settings
                                            Products, categories, variants, and discounts are managed in the Products, Variants, and Discounts tabs.
                                            🎁
                                            Rewards Settings
                                            Reward campaigns, redemption rules, and reward images are configured in the Rewards tab (Loyalty & Rewards Administration).
                                            💎
                                            Loyalty Settings
                                            Points-per-currency-unit, VIP levels, and reward expiry rules are configured in the Rewards tab's Loyalty & VIP sections.
                                            🏷️
                                            Coupon Settings
                                            Coupon rules, campaigns, and bulk generation are configured in the Rewards tab's Coupons section.
                                            💬
                                            Communication Settings
                                            Announcement targeting, message templates, broadcast defaults, and read-receipt rules are configured in the Communication Center.
                                            📊
                                            Report Settings
                                            Dashboards, KPIs, and exports are configured in the Analytics and Executive tabs.
                                            🔌
                                            Integrations
                                            No third-party integrations are connected yet. This category is architecture-ready (Part 18) for future providers — payment gateways, SMS/email providers, or cloud storage — without requiring a redesign of this Settings Center.
                                            ⚙️
                                            System Settings
                                            System health, maintenance windows, error logs, and backup exports are managed in the Operations Center.
                                            💾 Save Changes
